title: PLULON 2 Pcs Ivory Tablecloths Plastic Disposable Table Cover for Rectangle Tables 54 x 108 Inch Waterproof Tablecloth for Birthday Baby Shower Wedding Fiesta Party Home Kitchen Dining Decor
features: Value Pack: 2 x party plastic table cloth disposable. Kids birthday wedding baby shower party dinner table decorations
Size: 137 x 274 cm/54" x 108" rectangular tablecloth. If you need a larger size to use, you can put two or more together
Material: our party table cover is made of PEVA, so the product is thin and may be a bit transparent, please buy according to your needs

Plastic tablecloth is waterproof, spill-proof and easy to clean. These plastic tablecloths are perfect for rainbow theme party, birthday party, graduation party, baby shower party, barbecues, wedding, Easter party, Halloween party, Christmas party and other themed events
Kindly Reminder: The disposable plastic tablecloth is shipped folded, if you mind the crease, you can unfold and flatten it before your party
